name: AssistantSA
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y redis-server
postCreateCommand: npm install && python -m venv application-plane/backend/crawl-service/.venv && application-plane/backend/crawl-service/.venv/bin/pip install -r application-plane/backend/crawl-service/requirements.txt && application-plane/backend/crawl-service/.venv/bin/crawl4ai-setup && cargo build --release --manifest-path application-plane/backend/ap-voice/Cargo.toml
